schemes.name: PM-KISAN
schemes.description: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi. An initiative by the government of India in which all farmers will get up to ₹6,000 per year as minimum income support.
schemes.eligibility: Small and marginal farmers holding cultivable land.
schemes.benefits: ₹6,000 per year in three equal installments of ₹2,000 each.

schemes.name: Ayushman Bharat
schemes.description: Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana. A national public health insurance fund of the Government of India that aims to provide free access to health insurance coverage for low income earners.
schemes.eligibility: Economically weaker sections of society, identified through Socio-Economic Caste Census.
schemes.benefits: Health insurance cover of up to ₹5 lakhs per family per year.

schemes.name: PM Awas Yojana
schemes.description: Housing for All. An initiative to provide affordable housing to the urban poor with a target of building 20 million affordable houses.
schemes.eligibility: Economically Weaker Section (EWS), Low Income Group (LIG), and Middle Income Group (MIG).
schemes.benefits: Interest subsidy on home loans varying from 3% to 6.5%.

schemes.name: Startup India
schemes.description: Flagship initiative to build a strong eco-system for nurturing innovation and Startups in the country that will drive sustainable economic growth.
schemes.eligibility: Entity incorporated as a Private Limited Company or a Registered Partnership Firm.
schemes.benefits: Tax exemptions, easy compliance, and IPR support.

schemes.name: Mudra Loan
schemes.description: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana. A scheme to provide loans up to ₹10 Lakhs to non-corporate, non-farm small/micro enterprises.
schemes.eligibility: Any Indian citizen with a business plan for non-farm sector income generating activity.
schemes.benefits: Loans from ₹50,000 to ₹10 Lakhs.

schemes.name: PM Kaushal Vikas Yojana
schemes.description: Skill certification scheme that aims to train Indian youth in industry-relevant skills.
schemes.eligibility: Any Indian national, especially unemployed youth or school/college dropouts.
schemes.benefits: Free skill training, certification, and placement assistance.

schemes.name: Ujjwala Yojana
schemes.description: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana. Distributes subsidized LPG connections to poor households.
schemes.eligibility: Women belonging to BPL families.
schemes.benefits: Free LPG connection with financial support of ₹1,600 per connection.

schemes.name: Digital India
schemes.description: A campaign to ensure the Government's services are made available to citizens electronically.
schemes.eligibility: All Indian citizens.
schemes.benefits: Digital access to various government services, broadband access.

schemes.name: Stand-Up India
schemes.description: Facilitates bank loans for setting up a greenfield enterprise.
schemes.eligibility: SC/ST and/or women entrepreneurs, above 18 years of age.
schemes.benefits: Bank loans between ₹10 lakh and ₹1 crore.

schemes.name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao
schemes.description: A campaign to generate awareness and improve the efficiency of welfare services intended for girls.
schemes.eligibility: Families with a girl child.
schemes.benefits: Financial incentives for education and health of the girl child.

schemes.name: PM Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana
schemes.description: A one-year life insurance scheme renewable from year to year offering coverage for death due to any reason.
schemes.eligibility: People in the age group of 18 to 50 years having a bank account.
schemes.benefits: Life cover of ₹2 lakhs at a premium of ₹436 per annum.

schemes.name: PM Suraksha Bima Yojana
schemes.description: An accident insurance scheme offering accidental death and disability cover.
schemes.eligibility: People in the age group 18 to 70 years with a bank account.
schemes.benefits: Risk coverage of ₹2 lakh for accidental death and full disability and ₹1 lakh for partial disability, premium is ₹20 per annum.

schemes.name: Atal Pension Yojana
schemes.description: A pension scheme primarily targeted at the unorganized sector.
schemes.eligibility: All citizens between 18-40 years.
schemes.benefits: Guaranteed minimum monthly pension of ₹1,000 to ₹5,000 after 60 years of age.

schemes.name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
schemes.description: A small deposit scheme for the girl child launched as a part of the 'Beti Bachao Beti Padhao' campaign.
schemes.eligibility: Parents or legal guardians of a girl child up to 10 years of age.
schemes.benefits: High interest rate and tax benefits under Section 80C. Maturity on girl reaching 21 years of age.
documents: Identity and Address proof of Depositor

schemes.name: Make in India
schemes.description: An initiative to encourage companies to manufacture their products in India and incentivize dedicated investments into manufacturing.
schemes.eligibility: Domestic and foreign companies looking to invest/manufacture in India.
schemes.benefits: Tax benefits, easier compliance, infrastructure support.

schemes.name: Jal Jeevan Mission
schemes.description: Envisioned to provide safe and adequate drinking water through individual household tap connections by 2024 to all households in rural India.
schemes.eligibility: Rural households without a functional tap connection.
schemes.benefits: Functional Household Tap Connection (FHTC) providing clean drinking water.

schemes.name: PM Svanidhi
schemes.description: A special micro-credit facility for street vendors.
schemes.eligibility: Street vendors engaged in vending in urban areas as on or before March 24, 2020.
schemes.benefits: Working capital loan up to ₹10,000, subsidized interest rate.
documents: Vending Certificate/ID Card issued by Urban Local Body

schemes.name: PM Vishwakarma Yojana
schemes.description: A scheme to support traditional artisans and craftspeople working with their hands and tools, covering 18 trades including carpenters, blacksmiths, potters, tailors, and more.
schemes.eligibility: Traditional artisans and craftspeople engaged in specified trades, working with hands and tools.
schemes.benefits: Skill training, toolkit incentive of ₹15,000, collateral-free loans up to ₹3 lakhs, digital transaction incentive.

schemes.name: Agniveers - Agnipath Scheme
schemes.description: A recruitment scheme for Indian youth to serve in the Armed Forces for a period of four years.
schemes.eligibility: Indian citizens aged 17.5 to 23 years who have passed Class 10/12.
schemes.benefits: Monthly salary, Seva Nidhi package of ₹11.71 lakhs on completion, skill certification.

schemes.name: PM Garib Kalyan Anna Yojana
schemes.description: Free food grain scheme providing 5 kg of rice or wheat per person per month to poor families.
schemes.eligibility: Families covered under the National Food Security Act (NFSA) with Antyodaya or Priority Household cards.
schemes.benefits: 5 kg of free food grains per person per month.

schemes.name: National Education Policy Scholarships
schemes.description: Various scholarship programs under the National Education Policy 2020 for meritorious and economically disadvantaged students.
schemes.eligibility: Students from economically weaker sections pursuing higher education.
schemes.benefits: Tuition fee waiver, monthly stipend, book grants.

schemes.name: PM Matsya Sampada Yojana
schemes.description: A scheme to bring about Blue Revolution through sustainable and responsible development of the fisheries sector.
schemes.eligibility: Fishers, fish farmers, fish workers, and fish vendors.
schemes.benefits: Financial assistance for fishing infrastructure, insurance coverage, skill training.

schemes.name: Swachh Bharat Mission
schemes.description: A campaign to clean up the streets, roads and infrastructure of India's cities, towns, and rural areas, including elimination of open defecation.
schemes.eligibility: Households without a toilet, rural and urban areas.
schemes.benefits: ₹12,000 incentive for toilet construction, community toilet blocks.

schemes.name: National Rural Livelihood Mission (NRLM)
schemes.description: Aajeevika - aims to reduce poverty by enabling poor households to access gainful self-employment and skilled wage employment.
schemes.eligibility: Rural poor households, especially women.
schemes.benefits: Self-Help Group formation support, revolving fund of ₹10,000-₹15,000, community investment fund.

schemes.name: PM Fasal Bima Yojana
schemes.description: Crop insurance scheme providing financial support to farmers suffering crop loss/damage due to natural calamities, pests, and diseases.
schemes.eligibility: All farmers growing notified crops in notified areas.
schemes.benefits: Insurance coverage for crop loss due to natural calamities at low premium rates (2% for Kharif, 1.5% for Rabi).

schemes.name: Samagra Shiksha Abhiyan
schemes.description: An integrated scheme for school education extending from pre-school to class XII to ensure inclusive and equitable quality education.
schemes.eligibility: All school-going children from pre-school to class XII.
schemes.benefits: Free uniforms, textbooks, mid-day meals, digital education infrastructure.

schemes.name: PM Gram Sadak Yojana
schemes.description: A nationwide plan to provide good all-weather road connectivity to unconnected villages.
schemes.eligibility: Unconnected rural habitations with population of 500+ (250+ in hilly/tribal areas).
schemes.benefits: All-weather road connectivity to eligible rural habitations.

schemes.name: Kisan Credit Card
schemes.description: Provides farmers with timely access to credit for their agricultural and allied activities.
schemes.eligibility: Farmers, fishers, and animal husbandry practitioners.
schemes.benefits: Credit limit based on land holding, crop pattern; interest subvention of 2% on timely repayment.

schemes.name: National Pension System (NPS)
schemes.description: A voluntary, defined contribution retirement savings scheme to enable systematic savings during working life.
schemes.eligibility: Any Indian citizen aged 18-70 years.
schemes.benefits: Tax benefits under Section 80CCD, market-linked pension accumulation, annuity at retirement.

schemes.name: Kisan Samman Nidhi - UP Top-Up
schemes.description: Uttar Pradesh state government provides additional financial assistance to farmers on top of PM-KISAN benefits.
schemes.eligibility: Small and marginal farmers in Uttar Pradesh with valid PM-KISAN registration.
schemes.benefits: Additional ₹6,000 per year on top of PM-KISAN, total ₹12,000 per year.

schemes.name: UP Kanya Sumangala Yojana
schemes.description: Financial assistance scheme for girls in Uttar Pradesh providing support from birth to graduation.
schemes.eligibility: Girl children born in UP families with annual income less than ₹3 lakhs.
schemes.benefits: Total ₹15,000 in six installments from birth to graduation.

schemes.name: UP Pension Yojana (Vridha/Vidhwa/Divyang)
schemes.description: Social security pension scheme by UP government for elderly, widows, and disabled persons.
schemes.eligibility: Elderly (60+), widows, or disabled persons living in UP with BPL status.
schemes.benefits: Monthly pension of ₹500-₹1,000 depending on category.

schemes.name: Maharashtra Majhi Ladki Bahin Yojana
schemes.description: Financial assistance scheme for women in Maharashtra to promote women empowerment and self-reliance.
schemes.eligibility: Women aged 21-65 years from Maharashtra with family income below ₹2.5 lakhs.
schemes.benefits: ₹1,500 per month direct benefit transfer.

schemes.name: Maharashtra Shetkari Sanman Yojana
schemes.description: Loan waiver and financial assistance scheme for farmers in Maharashtra.
schemes.eligibility: Farmers in Maharashtra with crop loans up to ₹2 lakhs.
schemes.benefits: Crop loan waiver up to ₹2 lakhs, incentive for regular repayers.

schemes.name: Maharashtra Gharkul Yojana
schemes.description: Housing scheme by Maharashtra government to provide pucca houses to homeless families in rural areas.
schemes.eligibility: Homeless families in rural Maharashtra, priority to SC/ST/OBC.
schemes.benefits: Financial assistance of ₹1.20-₹1.30 lakhs for house construction.

schemes.name: Tamil Nadu Kalaignar Magalir Urimai Thittam
schemes.description: Women's rights scheme by Tamil Nadu government providing monthly financial assistance to women heads of families.
schemes.eligibility: Women aged 21+ who are heads of families in Tamil Nadu with annual income below ₹2.5 lakhs.
schemes.benefits: ₹1,000 per month direct cash transfer.

schemes.name: Tamil Nadu Free Laptop Scheme
schemes.description: Free laptop distribution to students who have passed Class 11 and 12 in Tamil Nadu government schools.
schemes.eligibility: Students who pass Class 11/12 in Tamil Nadu government and government-aided schools.
schemes.benefits: Free laptop with pre-loaded educational content.

schemes.name: Tamil Nadu Uzhavar Pathukappu Thittam
schemes.description: Farmers' protection scheme providing crop insurance and financial support to farmers in Tamil Nadu.
schemes.eligibility: All farmers in Tamil Nadu cultivating notified crops.
schemes.benefits: Crop insurance coverage, input subsidy for crop loss.

schemes.name: Bihar Mukhyamantri Kanya Utthan Yojana
schemes.description: Financial support for girl children from birth to graduation in Bihar to promote girl education.
schemes.eligibility: Girl children born in Bihar families. Only two daughters per family.
schemes.benefits: Total ₹54,100 from birth to graduation in installments.

schemes.name: Bihar Student Credit Card Yojana
schemes.description: Provides education loans to students for higher education in Bihar at zero interest rate.
schemes.eligibility: Bihar residents who have passed Class 12 and secured admission in a recognized institution.
schemes.benefits: Education loan up to ₹4 lakhs at 0% interest rate.

schemes.name: Bihar Diesel Anudan Yojana
schemes.description: Diesel subsidy scheme for farmers in Bihar to support irrigation costs.
schemes.eligibility: Farmers in Bihar who use diesel pumps for irrigation.
schemes.benefits: Subsidy of ₹75 per litre for diesel used for agricultural irrigation.

schemes.name: Rajasthan Chiranjeevi Swasthya Bima Yojana
schemes.description: Universal health insurance scheme by Rajasthan government providing cashless treatment at empaneled hospitals.
schemes.eligibility: All families in Rajasthan. Free for NFSA, SECC, small/marginal farmers; others pay ₹850/year.
schemes.benefits: Cashless treatment up to ₹25 lakhs per family per year.

schemes.name: Rajasthan Palanhar Yojana
schemes.description: Financial assistance to orphan children and children of specific vulnerable categories in Rajasthan.
schemes.eligibility: Orphan children, children of widows, disabled parents, or parents serving life sentences in Rajasthan.
schemes.benefits: ₹500/month (0-5 years), ₹1,000/month (6-18 years), plus clothing and shoes allowance.

schemes.name: Rajasthan Indira Gandhi Shahri Credit Card Yojana
schemes.description: Interest-free loans to urban street vendors and small traders in Rajasthan.
schemes.eligibility: Street vendors and small traders in urban Rajasthan aged 18-40.
schemes.benefits: Interest-free loan up to ₹50,000.

schemes.name: MP Ladli Laxmi Yojana
schemes.description: Financial assistance scheme for girls in Madhya Pradesh to strengthen the economic foundation of girl children.
schemes.eligibility: Girl children born after 1 January 2006 in MP families registered under the scheme within one year of birth.
schemes.benefits: Total ₹1,43,000 in installments from birth to age 21; ₹1 lakh on marriage after 21.

schemes.name: MP Mukhyamantri Yuva Internship Yojana
schemes.description: Internship scheme for unemployed youth in Madhya Pradesh to gain work experience.
schemes.eligibility: Unemployed youth aged 21-30 in Madhya Pradesh with graduation degree.
schemes.benefits: Stipend of ₹8,000 per month during one-year internship.

schemes.name: MP Sambal Yojana
schemes.description: Welfare scheme for unorganized workers in Madhya Pradesh providing social security benefits.
schemes.eligibility: Unorganized sector workers in Madhya Pradesh with Sambal card.
schemes.benefits: Accidental insurance of ₹4 lakhs, funeral assistance of ₹5,000, education support for children.

schemes.name: Karnataka Gruha Lakshmi Yojana
schemes.description: Financial assistance to women heads of households in Karnataka.
schemes.eligibility: Women who are heads of BPL/APL families in Karnataka. One woman per household.
schemes.benefits: ₹2,000 per month direct transfer to woman head of household.

schemes.name: Karnataka Anna Bhagya Yojana
schemes.description: Free rice scheme for BPL families in Karnataka providing additional food security.
schemes.eligibility: BPL families in Karnataka with valid ration cards.
schemes.benefits: 10 kg of free rice per person per month (up to 5 members per family).

schemes.name: Karnataka Raitha Siri Yojana
schemes.description: Agricultural support scheme for farmers in Karnataka providing subsidized seeds and equipment.
schemes.eligibility: Small and marginal farmers in Karnataka.
schemes.benefits: Subsidized seeds, farm equipment, and crop insurance premium support.

schemes.name: West Bengal Lakshmir Bhandar
schemes.description: Monthly income support to women heads of households in West Bengal.
schemes.eligibility: Women aged 25-60 in West Bengal. General category: family income below ₹2.5 lakhs; SC/ST: no income limit.
schemes.benefits: ₹500/month (General), ₹1,000/month (SC/ST) direct bank transfer.

schemes.name: West Bengal Kanyashree Prakalpa
schemes.description: Conditional cash transfer scheme to incentivize education of girls and prevent child marriage in West Bengal.
schemes.eligibility: Girls aged 13-18 enrolled in educational institution in West Bengal from families with income below ₹1.2 lakhs.
schemes.benefits: Annual scholarship of ₹750 and one-time grant of ₹25,000 on turning 18.

schemes.name: Telangana Rythu Bandhu
schemes.description: Investment support scheme for farmers in Telangana providing financial assistance for crop investment.
schemes.eligibility: All farmers in Telangana who own agricultural land.
schemes.benefits: ₹10,000 per acre per year in two installments (Kharif and Rabi seasons).

schemes.name: Telangana Kalyana Lakshmi / Shaadi Mubarak
schemes.description: Marriage assistance scheme for girls from economically weaker families in Telangana.
schemes.eligibility: Bride aged 18+ from Telangana with family income below ₹2 lakhs.
schemes.benefits: ₹1,00,116 for marriage assistance.

schemes.name: Odisha KALIA Yojana
schemes.description: Krushak Assistance for Livelihood and Income Augmentation - financial assistance to farmers and landless agricultural households in Odisha.
schemes.eligibility: Small and marginal farmers and landless agricultural labourers in Odisha.
schemes.benefits: ₹10,000 per family per year for small farmers; ₹12,500 per year for landless labourers.

schemes.name: Gujarat Kisan Suryodaya Yojana
schemes.description: Scheme to provide farmers in Gujarat with daytime electricity for irrigation, reducing dependence on diesel pumps and irregular power supply.
schemes.eligibility: Farmers in Gujarat with agricultural connections.
schemes.benefits: 16 hours of three-phase electricity supply including daytime hours for irrigation.

schemes.name: Gujarat Mukhyamantri Kisan Sahay Yojana
schemes.description: Crop loss compensation scheme for farmers in Gujarat affected by natural calamities like drought, unseasonal rain, or floods.
schemes.eligibility: All farmers in Gujarat who have suffered crop loss due to natural calamities.
schemes.benefits: Up to ₹25,000 per hectare for crop loss of 33-60%; up to ₹35,000 per hectare for loss above 60%.

schemes.name: Gujarat iKhedut Portal Schemes
schemes.description: Integrated portal offering various agricultural subsidies for farm equipment, drip irrigation, greenhouse construction, and horticulture in Gujarat.
schemes.eligibility: Farmers registered in Gujarat with valid land records.
schemes.benefits: Subsidies ranging from 50-90% on agricultural equipment, irrigation systems, and infrastructure.

schemes.name: Punjab Paani Bachao Paise Kamao
schemes.description: Direct benefit transfer scheme to encourage Punjab farmers to save electricity used for irrigation by rewarding them for reduced power consumption.
schemes.eligibility: Farmers in Punjab with agricultural tubewell connections.
schemes.benefits: ₹4 per unit of electricity saved compared to the allotted quota, paid directly to bank account.

schemes.name: Punjab Crop Diversification Scheme
schemes.description: Scheme to promote crop diversification in Punjab by encouraging farmers to shift from paddy to less water-intensive crops like maize, pulses, and oilseeds.
schemes.eligibility: Farmers in Punjab willing to diversify from paddy cultivation.
schemes.benefits: ₹2,500 per acre compensation for shifting from paddy to alternative crops.

schemes.name: Punjab Debt Waiver Scheme
schemes.description: Farm loan waiver scheme for small and marginal farmers in Punjab to provide relief from agricultural debt.
schemes.eligibility: Small and marginal farmers in Punjab with outstanding crop loans up to ₹2 lakhs.
schemes.benefits: Complete waiver of crop loans up to ₹2 lakhs.

schemes.name: Haryana Meri Fasal Mera Byora
schemes.description: Crop registration portal for Haryana farmers to register their crops and get MSP procurement, insurance, and subsidy benefits.
schemes.eligibility: All farmers in Haryana.
schemes.benefits: Access to MSP procurement, crop insurance under PMFBY, and agricultural subsidies through single registration.

schemes.name: Haryana Bhavantar Bharpai Yojana
schemes.description: Price deficiency payment scheme for Haryana farmers that compensates them when market prices fall below government-set protected prices for vegetables and fruits.
schemes.eligibility: Farmers in Haryana growing notified vegetables and fruits who register on Meri Fasal Mera Byora portal.
schemes.benefits: Compensation equal to the difference between protected price and actual selling price in the market.

schemes.name: Haryana Pashu Kisan Credit Card
schemes.description: Credit card scheme for animal husbandry farmers in Haryana to get affordable credit for purchasing cattle and maintaining livestock.
schemes.eligibility: Animal husbandry farmers and dairy farmers in Haryana.
schemes.benefits: Credit of ₹40,783 per buffalo and ₹6,000 per goat/sheep at subsidized interest rates.

schemes.name: Andhra Pradesh YSR Rythu Bharosa
schemes.description: Investment support scheme for farmers in Andhra Pradesh, providing financial assistance for crop cultivation expenses.
schemes.eligibility: All farmers in Andhra Pradesh who own or cultivate agricultural land.
schemes.benefits: ₹13,500 per year — ₹7,500 from state (Rythu Bharosa) + ₹6,000 from PM-KISAN.

schemes.name: Andhra Pradesh YSR Free Crop Insurance
schemes.description: Free crop insurance scheme for farmers in Andhra Pradesh where the state government pays the farmer's share of premium.
schemes.eligibility: All farmers in Andhra Pradesh growing notified crops.
schemes.benefits: Free crop insurance — government pays the farmer's premium share. Claims paid directly on crop loss.

schemes.name: Andhra Pradesh YSR Sunna Vaddi
schemes.description: Zero-interest loan scheme for farmers and women self-help groups in Andhra Pradesh on loans up to ₹3 lakhs.
schemes.eligibility: Farmers and women SHG members in AP with crop loans up to ₹3 lakhs who repay on time.
schemes.benefits: Complete interest reimbursement (0% interest) on crop loans up to ₹3 lakhs.

schemes.name: Kerala Comprehensive Health Insurance Scheme (CHIS)
schemes.description: State health insurance scheme for Below Poverty Line families in Kerala providing cashless treatment in empaneled hospitals.
schemes.eligibility: BPL families in Kerala.
schemes.benefits: Cashless treatment up to ₹5 lakhs per family per year in government and empaneled private hospitals.

schemes.name: Kerala Karshaka Kshemanidhi (Farmer Welfare Fund)
schemes.description: Social security scheme for farmers in Kerala providing pension, medical aid, and financial assistance.
schemes.eligibility: Farmers aged 18-55 in Kerala who cultivate at least 15 cents of land.
schemes.benefits: Monthly pension of ₹5,000 after age 60; medical aid up to ₹1 lakh; ₹2,00,000 for natural death.

schemes.name: Kerala Paddy Cultivation Promotion
schemes.description: Scheme to promote paddy cultivation in Kerala by providing cultivation support and procurement at MSP.
schemes.eligibility: Paddy farmers in Kerala.
schemes.benefits: ₹2,000 per hectare cultivation support and guaranteed procurement at MSP through Supplyco.

schemes.name: Chhattisgarh Rajiv Gandhi Kisan Nyay Yojana
schemes.description: Input subsidy scheme for farmers in Chhattisgarh providing financial assistance based on crop area and type for paddy, maize, sugarcane and other crops.
schemes.eligibility: All registered farmers in Chhattisgarh growing notified crops.
schemes.benefits: ₹9,000 per acre for paddy; ₹10,000 per acre for sugarcane; ₹7,000-9,000 for other crops.

schemes.name: Chhattisgarh Godhan Nyay Yojana
schemes.description: Scheme to purchase cow dung from cattle rearers and farmers at ₹2 per kg to promote organic farming and provide income to livestock owners.
schemes.eligibility: Cattle owners and farmers in Chhattisgarh.
schemes.benefits: ₹2 per kg for cow dung purchased at Gauthans; converted to vermicompost for sale.

schemes.name: Chhattisgarh Mahtari Vandan Yojana
schemes.description: Monthly financial assistance to married women in Chhattisgarh for women empowerment and economic independence.
schemes.eligibility: Married women aged 21+ residing in Chhattisgarh.
schemes.benefits: ₹1,000 per month (₹12,000 per year) transferred to bank account.

schemes.name: Jharkhand Mukhyamantri Krishi Ashirwad Yojana
schemes.description: Financial assistance scheme for small and marginal farmers in Jharkhand for Kharif crop cultivation.
schemes.eligibility: Small and marginal farmers in Jharkhand with up to 5 acres of cultivable land.
schemes.benefits: ₹5,000 per acre (max ₹25,000) per Kharif season for crop cultivation.

schemes.name: Jharkhand Birsa Harit Gram Yojana
schemes.description: Plantation scheme providing fruit-bearing plants to farmers in Jharkhand to increase income and promote horticulture.
schemes.eligibility: Farmers in Jharkhand, priority to tribal and BPL families.
schemes.benefits: 100-300 fruit-bearing plants per beneficiary with maintenance support for 3 years.

schemes.name: Jharkhand Neelambar Pitambar Jal Samridhi Yojana
schemes.description: Water harvesting and irrigation scheme in Jharkhand to build farm ponds, check dams, and water conservation structures.
schemes.eligibility: Farmers and rural households in Jharkhand.
schemes.benefits: Free construction of farm ponds (30x30x10 ft) and water conservation structures for irrigation.

schemes.name: Assam Mukhya Mantrir Krishi Sa-Sajuli Yojana
schemes.description: Farm mechanization scheme providing agricultural tools and equipment to farmers in Assam at subsidized rates.
schemes.eligibility: Farmers in Assam with a minimum of 2 bigha cultivable land.
schemes.benefits: Subsidized farm equipment including power tillers, spray pumps, and harvesting tools (70-90% subsidy).

schemes.name: Assam Chief Minister's Special Scheme for Tea Garden Workers
schemes.description: Welfare scheme for tea garden workers in Assam providing financial and health benefits.
schemes.eligibility: Registered tea garden workers and their families in Assam.
schemes.benefits: ₹5,000 per family annually; free education for children; health coverage.

schemes.name: Assam Orunodoi Scheme
schemes.description: Direct benefit transfer scheme for women in economically weaker households in Assam to improve living standards.
schemes.eligibility: Women (one per family) from households with monthly income below ₹5,000 in Assam.
schemes.benefits: ₹1,250 per month transferred to nominated woman's bank account.
